Built for Apple Intelligence.

The ultimate all-in-one, powered by the M4 chip and built for Apple Intelligence.◊Refer to legal disclaimers. With a spacious and stunning 60.96 cm (24″) 4.5K Retina display◊Refer to legal disclaimers. in an iconic, colourful design that livens up any room, iMac is perfect for work and play.

There’s never been a better time to upgrade.

Here’s what you get with the latest iMac.

  • A more spacious 4.5K Retina display.

  • Built for Apple Intelligence.

  • Advanced security with Touch ID.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

    Up to 6x faster than the most popular Intel-based iMac.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

  • Up to 6x faster than the most popular
    Intel-based iMac.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

    Advanced security with Touch ID.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

  • 12MP Center Stage camera with Desk View.

  • Built for Apple Intelligence.

  • Advanced security with Touch ID.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

    Faster graphics with hardware-accelerated ray tracing.

  • Faster graphics with hardware-accelerated ray tracing.

    Advanced security with Touch ID.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

  • Up to 2.1x faster
    for demanding creative workloads.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

  • Up to 70% faster performance on everyday tasks.◊Refer to legal disclaimers.

  • 12MP Center Stage camera with Desk View.

    Nano-texture glass option reduces glare.

  • Nano-texture glass option reduces glare.

    12MP Center Stage camera with Desk View.

New to Mac?

Easy to learn.

Mac is designed to be easy to learn and use — so you can start doing what you love in no time at all.

Superfast.

The combination of Apple silicon and macOS means Mac delivers incredible power and speed to everything you do.

Built to last.

With a durable aluminium enclosure and free software updates, Mac is in it for the long haul — inside and out.

◊Legal Disclaimers

  • Apple Intelligence: Apple Intelligence is available in beta on all Mac models with M1 and later, with Siri and device language set to Chinese (Simplified), English (Australia, Canada, India, Ireland, New Zealand, Singapore, South Africa, UK or US), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese (Brazil) or Spanish, as a macOS Sequoia update, with more languages coming over the course of the year, including Vietnamese. Some features may not be available in all regions or languages.

  • Colour Availability: iMac 24″ colour availability may vary.

  • Up to 6x Faster than the Most Popular Intel-Based iMac (21.5″ iMac, 2019): Testing conducted by Apple in September and October 2024 using pre-production 24″ iMac systems with Apple M4, 10-core CPU, 10-core GPU and 16GB of RAM, as well as production 3.0GHz 6-core Intel Core i5–based 21.5″ iMac systems with Radeon Pro 560X with 4GB of GDDR5 memory and 8GB of RAM, all configured with 256GB SSD. Tested using Super Resolution with Photomator 3.3.23 and a 4.4MB image. Performance tests are conducted using specific computer systems and reflect the approximate performance of iMac.

  • Up to 2.1x Faster than iMac with M1 Chip (24″ iMac, 2021) on Demanding Creative Workflows: Testing conducted by Apple in September and October 2024 using pre-production 24″ iMac systems with Apple M4, 10-core CPU, 10-core GPU, 32GB of RAM and 2TB SSD, as well as production 24″ iMac systems with Apple M1, 8-core CPU, 8-core GPU, 16GB of RAM and 2TB SSD. Adobe Photoshop 2024 v25.11.0 tested using the following filters and functions: sharpen, find edges, blur more, diffuse and content aware scale. Performance tests are conducted using specific computer systems and reflect the approximate performance of iMac.

  • Mac and iPhone: Requires iCloud and internet connection. iPhone Mirroring is available on Mac computers with Apple silicon and Intel-based Mac computers with a T2 Security Chip. Requires that your iPhone and Mac are signed in with the same Apple Account using two-factor authentication, your iPhone and Mac are near each other and have Bluetooth and Wi-Fi turned on, and your Mac is not using AirPlay or Sidecar. Some iPhone features (e.g. camera and microphone) are not compatible with iPhone Mirroring.

  • Wi-Fi 6E: Wi-Fi 6E is available in countries and regions where supported.

  • Up to 70% Faster Performance on Everyday Tasks (compared to 24″ iMac, 2021): Testing conducted by Apple in September and October 2024 using pre-production 24″ iMac systems with Apple M4, 10-core CPU, 10-core GPU, 32GB of RAM and 2TB SSD, as well as production 24″ iMac systems with Apple M1, 8-core CPU, 8-core GPU, 16GB of RAM and 2TB SSD. Tested with a selection of tasks using Microsoft Excel v16.88. Performance tests are conducted using specific computer systems and reflect the approximate performance of iMac.

  • Display: Screen size is measured diagonally. Actual diagonal screen size of the 24″ iMac is 59.69 cm (23.5″). The displays on the MacBook Air with the M1 chip and the 13″ MacBook Pro measure 33.74 cm (13.3″) diagonally. The displays on the 13″ MacBook Air with M2 or M3, the 15″ MacBook Air, and the 14″ and 16″ MacBook Pro have rounded corners at the top. When measured as a standard rectangular shape, the screens are 34.46 cm (13.6″), 38.91 cm (15.3″), 35.97 cm (14.2″) and 41.05 cm (16.2″) diagonally (actual viewable area is less).

  • Storage: 1GB = 1 billion bytes and 1TB = 1 trillion bytes; actual formatted capacity is less.

  • Power and Battery: Battery life for Apple TV app movie playback. Battery life varies by use and configuration. See apple.com/in/batteries for more information.

  • Touch ID: Magic Keyboard with Touch ID is included with iMac (M4) systems with 10‑core CPU, iMac (M3) systems with 10‑core GPU and iMac (M1) systems with 8-core GPU. It is available as an option on iMac (M3) systems with 8‑core GPU and iMac (M1) systems with 7-core GPU.

  • Accessories: Accessories are sold separately; availability varies by region.

  • Feature, App and Service Availability: Features are subject to change. Some features, applications and services may not be available in all regions or languages.

  • App Store: Apps are available on the App Store.
